description: wafw00f identifies and fingerprints Web Application Firewall (WAF) products. Useful as a pre-attack recon.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/wafw00f && python3 wafw00f.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/wafw00f && python3 wafw00f.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/wafw00f && python3 wafw00f.py --help`. Web Application Firewall fingerprinting.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the recon category. Fits when the engagement needs: Web Application Firewall fingerprinting.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: Web Application Firewall fingerprinting.

name: wafw00f
